Title: Shell Density
Description: The Shell Density node allows you to define regions of the shell around the origin {0, 0, 0} of the field based on the direction and the distance from origin. The angles, thickness and Density values of the shell are fully configurable through Curve assets.

Options.Label: Mirror
Options.Description: If true then the angle is mirrored in both directions of the axis.

Outputs.Label: AngleCurve
Outputs.Description: Determines the Density value at any given angle from the axis.

Outputs.Label: DistanceCurve
Outputs.Description: Determines the Density value at any distance from the origin.

Outputs.Label: Axis
Outputs.Description: Determines the axis against which the angle is calculated.
